title: Direct Messaging (DM) Flow
interaction_flow: SenderAgent → ProxyServer: POST /dm/send { recipient_node_id, content, metadata }
ProxyServer → DmHandler: dmHandler.send({ recipientNodeId, content, metadata })
DmHandler validates: recipientNodeId required, content required
DmHandler → MailboxStore: store.send({ type: 'dm', payload: { recipient_node_id, content, metadata, sent_at: ISO }, priority: 'normal' })
MailboxStore: generateUUIDv7() → creates outbound msg { id, direction:'outbound', type:'dm', status:'pending' } → appendLine(messages.jsonl)
DmHandler → MailboxStore: store.poll({ type: 'dm', limit: limit || 20 })
MailboxStore: filters _inbound where type='dm' AND status='pending', returns up to limit messages
ProxyServer → MailboxStore: store.ack(message_ids) [direct, no DmHandler intermediary]
DmHandler → MailboxStore: store.list({ type: 'dm', limit: limit||20, offset: offset||0 })
MailboxStore: filters all messages where type='dm', sorts by created_at DESC, slices by offset+limit
key_relationships: ProxyServer instantiates DmHandler: new DmHandler({ store: MailboxStore, logger })
ProxyServer routes delegate to DmHandler when dmHandler instance is present (else fall back to store directly)
DmHandler.send() → MailboxStore.send() creates outbound direction message
DmHandler.poll() → MailboxStore.poll() reads inbound direction, status=pending
DmHandler.ack() → MailboxStore.ack() marks inbound messages as 'delivered'
DmHandler.list() → MailboxStore.list() returns full history of type='dm'
ACK route (/mailbox/ack) is shared — not DM-specific; bypasses DmHandler

MailboxStore.send: ({ type, payload, channel, priority, refId, expiresAt }) → { message_id, status }
MailboxStore.list: ({ type, direction?, status?, limit?, offset? }) → Message[]
MailboxStore.writeInbound: ({ id?, type, payload, channel?, priority?, ... }) → string (id)

routes.POST /mailbox/ack: routes → store.ack() directly (shared with all message types)

message_model.outbound_dm: { id, channel:'evomap-hub', direction:'outbound', type:'dm', status:'pending', payload:{ recipient_node_id, content, metadata, sent_at }, priority:'normal', created_at, retry_count }
message_model.inbound_dm: { id, direction:'inbound', type:'dm', status:'pending'→'delivered' after ack }
message_model.persistence: JSONL append-only file (messages.jsonl) with in-memory Map index; UUIDv7 IDs

important_notes: DmHandler is a thin facade over MailboxStore scoped to type='dm'. ProxyServer instantiates it in src/proxy/index.js and passes it as an extension to buildRoutes(). The /mailbox/ack route is shared across all message types — DmHandler.ack() exists but is not wired to a dedicated HTTP route. Fallback path in routes bypasses DmHandler and calls store methods directly if dmHandler is absent.
